recent_turns.content: Good, all files copied. Now stash everything and start creating branches.
PR 1 created. Now PR 2 — solutions documentation.
PR 2 created. Now PR 3 — review findings.
All 3 PRs created. Now merging them to `hart`.

_meta.annotation: Multi-PR git workflow: stash, create branch, copy files, add, commit, push, PR create — repeated for 3 independent PRs. Clean Bash sequences with TodoWrite checkpointing. Forward-only motion through a complex multi-branch operation.
